## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation
- Describe how this was tested.

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked the related issue/RFC (if applicable).
- [ ] I ran relevant local validation (tests/build/lint) for touched modules.
- [ ] I applied at least one `area:*` label and one `type:*` label.
- [ ] I updated docs for any user-visible/API/workflow/config changes.
- [ ] I reviewed [Documentation Governance](../docs/documentation-governance.adoc) and followed its PR checklist.
- [ ] I called out any breaking changes and migration steps (if applicable).

## Notes for reviewers
- Add any specific areas where feedback is needed.
